creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've modified your xpi-searchstatus diff a bit to also include the LICENSE
file which ships with the XPI. Attached is a diff for your reference
containing the changes.

Let me know if you approve it ?

Thanks
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA      | GPG: F682 CDCC 39DC 0FEA E116  20B6 C746 CFA9 E74F A4B0
freebsd.org!ashish | http://people.freebsd.org/~ashish/

They who can give up essential liberty to obtain a little temporary safety,
deserve neither liberty nor safety.
  -- Benjamin Franklin, Memoirs of the life and writings of Benjamin Franklin
